prompt: Migrate just the schema (not the CRUD methods, not the tests) of the resource defined in /Users/simon.lynch/git/terraform-provider-openstack/openstack/resource_openstack_compute_volume_attach_v2.go from terraform-plugin-sdk/v2 to terraform-plugin-framework.
